title: <<COMPONENTNAME>> component configuration
description: The configuration <<COMPONENTNAME>> itself understands: the object at `component.global` in an EdgeCommons config file. Each entry of `component.instances[]` is validated against `#/$defs/instance`. The library envelope (logging, messaging, metricEmission, heartbeat, streaming, credentials, parameters, health, hierarchy, identity, topic, tags) is owned by the canonical schema (schema/edgecommons-config-schema.json) and is deliberately NOT redeclared here. This schema starts from the scaffold's own example configs (test-configs/config_1.json, test-configs/config_2.json) — extend it as you add configuration to your component, and keep `additionalProperties: false` so a typo'd or unknown key is caught at deploy time instead of being silently ignored.

publish_interval.description: Seconds between the scaffold's publish tick (the app-status / metric / data / event quartet it emits each loop).

instance.title: <<COMPONENTNAME>> instance configuration
instance.description: One entry of `component.instances[]`. The scaffold ships with no instances (it runs as the implicit `main` instance); declare the per-instance keys your component reads here as you add them.

id.description: Unique instance identifier. It is the `{instance}` token of this instance's UNS topics (ecv1/{device}/{component}/{instance}/...) and is stamped into the envelope identity.

publish_interval.description: Per-instance override of the global publish tick, in seconds.
